name: claude-cli-switcher
description: Switch between multiple Claude Code (Anthropic Pro) accounts on one machine. Snapshot each native login as a profile, swap with one command, /status keeps showing the right Email/Organization. Interactive menu + CLI.

scripts.check: zsh -n csw && PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/csw-pycache python3 -m py_compile lib/claude-sessions.py
scripts.test: echo "Run zsh ./test.sh in a TTY" && exit 0

author: ntdung6868
